_description: Mac Mini (Apple Silicon) — Ollama backend (LAN). Merge the 'ollama-mac-mini' block into your base models.json providers object, or use as a standalone models.json on the Mac Mini itself.
_notes: Mac Mini runs Ollama on port 11434, same API as PC/Laptop — no backend switch needed.
Mixed fleet (PC/Laptop + Mac Mini on LAN): merge ollama-mac-mini into your base models.json providers.
Single Mac Mini only: use this file directly as ~/.pi/agent/models.json.
Tailscale / VPN: use models-remote.json instead — same models, Tailscale hostname.
snowflake-arctic-embed2 (1.2 GB) is installed for grounded-code-mcp RAG embeddings — it is not listed as a chat model because Pi does not route completions to it.
Mac Mini Ollama must be exposed: export OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0 && ollama serve
qwen2.5-coder:7b removed — known incompatibility with Pi. phi4:14b retained for .NET completions only (no tool support).

models.name: Qwen3 Coder 30B MoE (Mac Mini)
models._notes: Primary coder — Python, PHP, Rust, general reasoning; MoE (3.3B active / 30B total), 256K context; supports tools

models.name: Phi-4 14B (Mac Mini)
models._notes: .NET 10 / C# specialist — US-origin Microsoft model; WARNING: no tool support, RAG extensions disabled
